action.description:
Introduced by Senators Spreitzer, Smith, Dassler-Alfheim, Keyeski, Ratcliff, Larson, Roys and Hesselbein; 
cosponsored by Representatives Roe, Anderson, Brown, Arney, Bare, Billings, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Goodwin, Joers, Johnson, Madison, McCarville, Miresse, Neubauer, Ortiz-Velez, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Sinicki, Stroud, Subeck and Udell
